name: Magnuson Franchising, LLC

red_flags.summary: No Item 19 financial performance representation disclosed.

validation_questions: Confirm current auditor and most recent audit opinion.

internal_unresolveds.reason: Parent license termination risk: Magnuson Company can terminate trademark license on 6 months' notice without cause, stripping all franchisees of brand rights. No mitigation or contingency plan disclo
Affiliate Hotel competition: Parent operates Affiliate Hotels competing with Branded Hotels; conflict resolution entirely at franchisor discretion with no formal protocol
Confidentiality restrictions on former franchisees — 'in some instances' sign provisions restricting ability to speak openly; scope and enforceability unclear
Formation state ambiguity: financial statement notes say formed as Washington LLC; Item 1 says Wyoming LLC
TX outlet count OCR artifact: Table 3 raw text shows '21' for Texas 2024 year-end; corrected to 2 based on all cross-references
TX outlet count: Table 3 shows '21' in raw text vs. 11 systemwide in Table 1 and 2 TX properties in E-1
Formation state: Note 1 says 'Washington limited liability company'; Item 1 says 'Wyoming limited liability company'
E-2 lists Texarkana franchisee as 'left the system' in FY2024 but Table 3 shows zero terminations in Texas 2024; footnote says 'since the end of our most recent fiscal year'
